rules: The generated current pointer is the only lawful present-tense current-head truth source.
Tracked report receipts may support, mirror, or explain current truth, but they must never outrank the current pointer.
Documentary and commercial markdown surfaces are never active posture authority.
If active supporting truth surfaces disagree with the current pointer, authority convergence must fail closed.
summary: Separates active current-head truth from tracked supporting mirrors and documentary explanation surfaces.
